ssml_content: <speak><prosody rate="fast">Why does love always leave us? Or more specifically, why does the washing machine eat exactly <emphasis level="strong">ONE</emphasis> sock every single time?</prosody> We put them in as a pair. A beautifully bonded couple facing the harsh, soapy suds of adversity together. We trust the machine. <break time="1s"/> And yet, only one returns. The survivor. The lonely widow of the heavy-duty laundry cycle, left to aimlessly wander the drawer forever. <break time="2s"/> <prosody rate="slow">Are we all just unpaired socks waiting for a match in the great drawer of life? Drop your saddest sock tragedy in the comments below.</prosody></speak>
